name: SJG-136
description: SJG-136 has been used in trials studying the treatment of Recurrent Fallopian Tube Cancer, Secondary Acute Myeloid Leukemia, de Novo Myelodysplastic Syndromes, Recurrent Ovarian Epithelial Cancer, and Secondary Myelodysplastic Syndromes, among others.

interactions.name: Methadone
interactions.description: SJG-136 may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Methadone.

interactions.name: Olanzapine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when SJG-136 is combined with Olanzapine.

interactions.name: Sodium oxybate
interactions.description: SJG-136 may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Sodium oxybate.

interactions.name: Hyaluronidase
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of SJG-136 can be decreased when used in combination with Hyaluronidase.

interactions.name: Clozapine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when SJG-136 is combined with Clozapine.

interactions.name: Ambroxol acefyllinate
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of SJG-136 can be decreased when used in combination with Ambroxol acefyllinate.

interactions.name: Theophylline
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of SJG-136 can be decreased when used in combination with Theophylline.

interactions.name: Dyphylline
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of SJG-136 can be decreased when used in combination with Dyphylline.

interactions.name: Aminophylline
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of SJG-136 can be decreased when used in combination with Aminophylline.

interactions.name: Fosphenytoin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Fosphenytoin can be increased when it is combined with SJG-136.

interactions.name: Phenytoin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Phenytoin can be increased when it is combined with SJG-136.

interactions.name: Teduglutide
interactions.description: The serum concentration of SJG-136 can be increased when it is combined with Teduglutide.
